stemHtml:
A Polar Front depression is approaching Great Britain, moving west to east across the Atlantic during winter. Regarding the air masses surrounding the depression:

The warm sector will contain (1) _____ air
The air to the East of the depression will be (2) _____ air
The air to the West of the depression will be (3) _____ air; and
The air North of the depression may be (4) _____ air
